iterations.feedback:
<critique>
1. Format: OK
2. Payoff alignment: Your proposed trade gives you 43 dollars, but you could have proposed a 57-43 split in your last move, which would have given you 43 dollars as well but might have been more acceptable to Player BLUE. You could have proposed a 57-43 split in your last move to maximize your utility while still being plausible.
3. Opponent plausibility: Player BLUE has consistently asked for a 55-45 split, so proposing a 57-43 split in your last move might have been rejected. However, since Player BLUE must accept or reject in their last move, proposing a 57-43 split could have been a reasonable risk to take.
4. Consistency: OK
5. Rule compliance: OK
</critique>
